info.title: Pokemon Price Tracker API
info.description:
# Pokemon Price Tracker API

Access real-time and historical Pokemon card pricing data from TCGPlayer, plus graded card sales from eBay (PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC, and more).

## Features
- **50,000+ English and Japanese cards** with daily price updates
- **Japanese card support** with dedicated collections
- **Sealed products** (booster boxes, ETBs, bundles)
- **Graded card sales** from eBay (PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC, and more)
- **Cardmarket EUR prices** (Beta, Pro/Business plans)
- **GemRate population reports** (Business plan)
- **Price history** with gap-filling interpolation
- **eBay title parsing** for card identification
- **Daily bulk CSV exports** (Business plan)

## Authentication
All API requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

Get your free API key at [pokemonpricetracker.com/api](https://www.pokemonpricetracker.com/api).

## Rate Limiting
The API uses a credit-based rate limiting system:

| Plan | Price | Daily Credits | Per-Minute Calls |
|------|-------|---------------|------------------|
| Free | $0/mo | 100 | 60 |
| API | $9.99/mo | 20,000 | 60 |
| Business | $99/mo | 200,000 | 500 |

### Credit Costs
- Basic card query: **1 credit per card**
- With price history: **+1 credit per card**
- With eBay data: **+1 credit per card**
- With Cardmarket EUR prices: **+1 credit per card** (Pro/Business only)
- maxDataPoints above 365: **+1 credit per card** (Business only)
- Population data: **2 credits per card** (Business only)
- Parse title: **2 credits** (+1 for fuzzy matching, +1 for long titles, +1 for maxSuggestions > 5)

**Important:** requests are billed on the requested `limit` (default 50), not the number of results returned — a default `/cards` or `/sealed-products` request costs 50 credits. Pass `limit=1` for single lookups, billed at the per-card cost (1 credit basic, plus optional data surcharges).

Every response reports the exact charge in `metadata.apiCallsConsumed` and the `X-API-Calls-Consumed` header. `X-RateLimit-Daily-Remaining` reflects your credit balance after the request.

### Plan Features
| Feature | Free | API | Business |
|---------|------|-----|----------|
| History window | 3 days | 6 months | Unlimited |
| API keys | 1 | Up to 5 | Unlimited |
| Japanese cards | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Graded prices (PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC) | Yes (+1 credit) | Yes (+1 credit) | Yes (+1 credit) |
| eBay sold listings (auction/BIN details) | No | No | Yes |
| Cardmarket EUR prices (Beta) | No | Yes (+1 credit) | Yes (+1 credit) |
| Population reports | No | No | Yes (2 credits/card) |
| Bulk CSV exports | No | No | Yes (2/day) |
| Commercial use | No | No | Yes |
| Support | Community | Email (24h) | Priority |

## Multi-Word Search
The search parameter supports natural language queries:
- `search=charizard base set` - Find Charizard from Base Set
- `search=pikachu 4/102` - Find card by number
- `search=umbreon ex unseen forces` - Find specific card variants

get.description:
Retrieve Pokemon cards with filtering, sorting, and optional historical/eBay/Cardmarket data.

**Credit Cost Formula:**
`limit × (1 + includeHistory + includeEbay + includeCardmarket + premiumGranularity)`

(premiumGranularity = 1 when maxDataPoints > 365, Business plan only)

Credits are billed on the requested `limit` (default 50), not the number of matches. With `fetchAllInSet=true` the charge is based on the number of cards in the set. Single-card lookups (`limit=1` or fetching by `tcgPlayerId`) are billed at the per-card cost (e.g. 1 credit basic, 2 with `includeHistory`).

**Worked example:** a default request (`limit=50`) with `includeHistory=true` costs 100 credits. The exact charge is reported in `metadata.apiCallsConsumed` and the `X-API-Calls-Consumed` header; `X-RateLimit-Daily-Remaining` shows your balance after the request.

**Response Limits:**
- Standard: 200 cards max
- With history OR eBay data: 100 cards max
- With both history AND eBay: 25 cards max

parameters.name: tcgPlayerId
parameters.description: Get specific card by TCGPlayer ID. Returns single card object instead of array.

parameters.name: cardId
parameters.description: Alias for tcgPlayerId. Get specific card by TCGPlayer ID.

parameters.name: setId
parameters.description: Filter by set using numeric TCGPlayer GroupId (e.g., "1407") from the /v2/sets response field tcgPlayerNumericId. For name-based filtering, use the "set" parameter instead.

parameters.name: setName
parameters.description: Legacy parameter for set name filter. Use "set" instead.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Multi-word search across name, setName, cardNumber, rarity, cardType. Supports "X/Y" card number format.

parameters.name: cardType
parameters.description: Filter by card type (partial match, case-insensitive). Note the accent in "Pokémon".

parameters.name: printing
parameters.description: Filter by printing variant (e.g., "1st Edition", "Unlimited", "Holofoil", "Reverse Holofoil", "Normal")

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Filter by condition (e.g., "Near Mint", "Lightly Played", "Moderately Played", "Heavily Played", "Damaged")

parameters.name: includeHistory
parameters.description: Include price history data (+1 credit per card). Free plan limited to 3 days.

parameters.name: includeEbay
parameters.description: Include eBay graded card sales data (PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC, etc.). +1 credit per card. Limits response to 50 cards max.

parameters.name: includeCardmarket
parameters.description: Include Cardmarket EUR prices (Beta). +1 credit per card. Pro/Business plans only — silently ignored on the Free plan. ~85% of English cards have Cardmarket data.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Days of historical data to return. Plan caps: Free 3 days, Pro 180 days, Business unlimited.

parameters.name: maxDataPoints
parameters.description: Maximum data points per condition in price history. Defaults: Free 30, Pro 180, Business 365. Caps: Free 30, Pro 180, Business unlimited. Values above 365 (Business only) cost +1 credit per card.

parameters.name: fetchAllInSet
parameters.description: Fetch all cards in set (requires set filter). Increases limit to 200.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results per page. Caps: 200 (basic), 100 (with history OR eBay), 25 (with both). When tcgPlayerId is provided without an explicit limit, defaults to 1.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

data.name: Charizard
data.flavorText: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.

cardWithFullPricing.summary: Card with per-condition pricing (includeHistory=true) — prices.conditions/variants deprecated Aug 2026, use priceHistory instead

cardWithEbayData.summary: Card with eBay graded sales (includeEbay=true). Note: soldListings is Business tier only.

cardWithBothHistoryAndEbay.summary: Card with both history and eBay data (includeBoth=true)

400.description: Bad request - missing required filter or invalid parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve Pokemon TCG sets with optional filtering and sorting.

Retrieve sealed Pokemon products (booster boxes, ETBs, bundles) with pricing.

**At least one filter is required:** `tcgPlayerId`, `setId`, `set`, `search`, `minPrice`, or `maxPrice`.

**Credit Cost Formula:**
`limit × (1 + includeHistory)`

Credits are billed on the requested `limit` (default 50), not the number of matches. With `fetchAllInSet=true` the charge is based on the number of products in the set. Single-product lookups (`limit=1`) are billed at the per-product cost (1 credit, or 2 with `includeHistory`).

**Worked example:** a default request (`limit=50`) costs 50 credits — 100 with `includeHistory=true`. The exact charge is reported in `metadata.apiCallsConsumed` and the `X-API-Calls-Consumed` header; `X-RateLimit-Daily-Remaining` shows your balance after the request.

**Response Limits:**
- Standard: 200 products max
- With history: 100 products max

parameters.name: tcgPlayerId
parameters.description: Get specific product by TCGPlayer ID

parameters.name: setId
parameters.description: Filter by set ID (NOT product ID)

parameters.name: includeHistory
parameters.description: Include price history (+1 credit per product)

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Days of historical data. Plan caps: Free 3 days, Pro 180 days, Business unlimited.

parameters.name: fetchAllInSet
parameters.description: Fetch all products in set (requires set filter)

post.description:
Parse eBay-style listing titles to extract card information and match against the database.

**Credit Cost:**
- Base: 2 credits
- Fuzzy matching: +1 credit
- Long title (>100 chars): +1 credit
- Max suggestions > 5: +1 credit

**Use Cases:**
- Identify cards from eBay listings
- Extract PSA/BGS/CGC grades
- Match card variants and editions

Pikachu VMAX 044/185 Vivid Voltage Ultra Rare NM

get.description:
Retrieve grading population data from GemRate for Pokemon cards. Includes PSA, BGS, SGC, and CGC grade counts, gem rates, and population statistics.

**Business plan required.** Free and Pro plan users receive a `403` response.

**Credit Cost:** 2 credits per card (premium data)

**Response Limits:**
- Max 100 cards per request
- Bulk queries (tcgPlayerIds) max 50 IDs

**Use Cases:**
- Grading ROI calculations
- Population report analysis
- Market scarcity assessment
- Investment decisions based on gem rates

parameters.name: tcgPlayerId
parameters.description: Get population data for a specific card by TCGPlayer ID. Returns single object instead of array.

parameters.name: tcgPlayerIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated TCGPlayer IDs for bulk queries (max 50)

parameters.name: minPopulation
parameters.description: Filter by minimum total population across all graders

parameters.name: grader
parameters.description: Filter by grading company having data

parameters.name: minGemRate
parameters.description: Filter by minimum combined gem rate percentage (0-100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

example.message: Population report data is only available to Business subscribers.

get.summary: Download daily price dump (Business plan only)
get.description:
Download a gzip-compressed CSV snapshot of all card prices, sealed product prices, eBay graded sales, or grading population data.

**Business plan required.** Free and API plan users receive a `403` response.

The dump is regenerated daily at **6:00 AM UTC**. Each call redirects (`302`) to a Vercel Blob URL — download the file directly from there. No per-card API credits are consumed; downloads are tracked via a separate daily quota of **2 downloads per day**.

### CSV columns by type
| type | Columns |
|------|---------|
| `cards` | tcgPlayerId, name, setName, setId, cardNumber, rarity, language, printing, marketPrice, lowPrice, sellers, lastPriceUpdate |
| `sealed` | tcgPlayerId, name, setName, setId, productType, language, marketPrice, lowPrice, sellers, lastPriceUpdate |
| `ebay` | tcgPlayerId, grade, salesCount, averagePrice, medianPrice, smartMarketPrice, smartMarketConfidence, marketPrice7Day, marketTrend, salesVelocityWeekly |
| `population` | tcgPlayerId, grader, totalPopulation, gemRate, g1, g2, g3, g4, g5, g6, g7, g8, g9, g9_5, g10, auth, qualifiers, pristine, perfect, matchConfidence |

All CSV files include a header row and are UTF-8 encoded with RFC 4180 quoting.

### Best practices
- **Download once per day, not per request.** The dump only changes once daily (regenerated at 6:00 AM UTC). Pull it after 6:00 AM UTC, cache it locally, and serve reads from your own copy. You have 2 downloads/day — treat the second as a retry, not a polling loop.
- **Use export for full-catalog syncs; use `/cards` for lookups.** One export request replaces thousands of paginated calls and consumes zero API credits. For specific cards or live single-card prices, the regular endpoints are better.
- **Follow the redirect.** The endpoint returns `302` to a Vercel Blob URL — ensure your HTTP client follows redirects (`curl -L`, axios/fetch default). Don't cache or hardcode the blob URL; it changes daily.
- **Decompress the gzip stream.** Files are `.csv.gz` — pipe through `gunzip` (e.g. `curl -L ... | gunzip > cards.csv`) or decompress in code before parsing.
- **Join datasets on `tcgPlayerId`.** All four dataset types share `tcgPlayerId` — download them separately and join locally for a complete per-card record.
- **Handle `503` gracefully.** Before 6:00 AM UTC the new dump may not exist yet; respect the `Retry-After` header (default 1 hour). A `503` does not count against your daily download quota.
- **Check freshness headers.** Use `X-Dump-Generated-At` to confirm today's data and `X-Export-Downloads-Remaining` to track quota before scheduling the next pull.

302.description: Redirect to the gzip-compressed CSV file on Vercel Blob

X-Export-Reset-At.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the download quota resets (UTC midnight)

X-Dump-Generated-At.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the dump was generated

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key

example.message: Price dump exports are available on the Business plan ($99/mo). Upgrade at pokemonpricetracker.com/pricing

429.description: Daily download limit reached (2 downloads per day)

example.message: Business plan allows 2 price dump downloads per day.

503.description: Dump not yet available — generated daily at 6:00 AM UTC

example.message: The daily price dump is generated at 6:00 AM UTC. Please try again later.

bearerAuth.description: API key authentication. Get your key at pokemonpricetracker.com/api

total.description: Total number of results matching the query

count.description: Number of results in this response

hasMore.description: Whether more results exist beyond this page

days.description: Number of days of historical data

maxDataPoints.description: Maximum data points per condition applied to this response

granularityNote.description: Note about downsampling, present when data was downsampled

listings.description: Always null — per-condition listing counts are not tracked

lastUpdated.description: When this price was last updated

VariantPricing.description: Printing variant prices (e.g., Normal, Holofoil, Reverse Holofoil)

sellers.description: Number of unique sellers offering this card

primaryPrinting.description: Printing variant the market price represents (e.g., "Holofoil")

conditions.description: ⚠️ Deprecated — will be removed August 2026. Use priceHistory.conditions instead. Latest price per condition, only present when includeHistory=true.

variants.description: ⚠️ Deprecated — will be removed August 2026. Use priceHistory.variants instead. Without includeHistory=true contains only the primary condition (Near Mint) per printing.

priceWasCorrected.description: Whether an automated price correction was applied

condition.description: Condition context for this price point

ConditionHistory.description: Price history for a specific condition

dataPoints.description: Number of data points in history

conditions.description: Price history organized by condition (Near Mint, Lightly Played, etc.)

variants.description: Price history organized by printing variant, then condition

variants_tracked.description: List of printing variants being tracked

totalDataPoints.description: Total number of price data points across all conditions

latestDate.description: Most recent date in price history

lastUpdated.description: When price history was last updated

daysUsed.description: Days of data used in calculation

IndividualListing.description: Individual eBay sold listing details (Business tier only)

listingType.description: Whether sold via auction or Buy It Now

bestOfferAccepted.description: Whether the sale was through Best Offer

shippingCost.description: Shipping cost in USD (0 = free shipping)

EbayPriceHistoryPoint.description: Daily price aggregation for a specific grade

average.description: Average sale price for the day

count.description: Number of sales on this day

totalValue.description: Total value of sales on this day

EbayData.description: eBay graded card sales data (PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC, and more)

salesByGrade.description: Sales data by grading company and grade. Keys are formatted as {company}{grade} (e.g., psa10, cgc9.5, bgs10). Supported companies: PSA, CGC, BGS, SGC, TAG, ACE, MNT, CGA, AGS.

monthlyTotal.description: Total sales in the last 30 days

soldListings.description: Individual sold listings with full details (BUSINESS TIER ONLY). Keys are grade codes (psa10, cgc9.5, etc.)

psa10.title: PSA 10 GEM MINT Charizard Base Set Pokemon

priceHistory.description: Daily price history by grade. Keys are grade codes, values are objects with date keys.

totalSales.description: Total number of sales tracked across all grades

totalValue.description: Total value of all sales tracked

gradesTracked.description: List of grade keys being tracked (e.g., ["psa8", "psa9", "psa10", "cgc9.5"])

dateRangeStart.description: Earliest date in the tracked sales data

dateRangeEnd.description: Most recent date in the tracked sales data

CardmarketPrices.description: Cardmarket EUR prices (when includeCardmarket=true, Pro/Business plans only)

marketEur.description: Latest Cardmarket market price in EUR (primary variant)

lowEur.description: Latest Cardmarket low price in EUR (primary variant)

trendEur.description: Latest Cardmarket trend price in EUR (primary variant)

lastUpdated.description: When Cardmarket data was last updated

variants.description: Per-variant Cardmarket pricing (Normal, Holofoil, Reverse Holofoil)

latestPrice.description: Most recent market price in EUR

latestDate.description: Date of the most recent price

setName.description: Name of the set this card belongs to

totalSetNumber.description: Always null — legacy field kept for backward compatibility

energyType.description: Array of energy types for this card

variants.description: Current price snapshot per printing variant

lowPrice.description: Lowest listing price for this printing

printingsAvailable.description: Printing variants available for this card (e.g., ["Normal", "Holofoil"])

needsDetailedScrape.description: Whether card needs additional data collection

ebay.description: eBay graded card sales data (when includeEbay=true)

cardmarketPrices.description: Cardmarket EUR prices (when includeCardmarket=true, Pro/Business only)

data.description: Single card object when querying by tcgPlayerId, array otherwise

premiumGranularity.description: Present when maxDataPoints > 365 was requested (Business plan only)

tcgPlayerId.description: TCGPlayer unique identifier for the set (URL slug format)

tcgPlayerNumericId.description: Numeric TCGPlayer GroupId. Use this value with the cards endpoint setId parameter. May be null for inactive/upcoming sets.

cardCount.description: Number of cards in the set

unopenedPrice.description: Unopened product price on this date

setId.description: Set identifier this product belongs to

data.description: Single product when querying by tcgPlayerId, array otherwise

fuzzyMatching.description: Enable fuzzy matching against card database (+1 credit)

maxSuggestions.description: Maximum card matches to return (+1 credit if > 5)

strictMode.description: Require higher confidence threshold for matches

title.example: Pokemon PSA 10 Charizard VMAX Rainbow Rare 074/073 Champions Path

matchScore.description: How well this card matches the parsed data

matchReasons.description: Reasons why this card was matched

language.description: Which database the match came from

GraderPopulation.description: Population data for a single grading company (PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC)

qualifiers.description: Cards with qualifiers (MK, OC, ST, PD)

totalPopulation.description: Total graded cards for this company

GemrateData.description: GemRate population data for a card

totalPopulation.description: Total graded cards across all companies

combinedGemRate.description: Combined gem rate percentage across all graders

gradersTracked.description: List of grading companies with data for this card

combinedTotals.description: Combined grade totals across all graders

percentHigher.description: Percentage of cards graded higher than each grade (useful for ROI calculations)

matchConfidence.description: Confidence level of the card match in GemRate database

matchScore.description: Match score (0-1) indicating how closely the card matched

lastFetchedDate.description: When population data was last fetched

lastPopulationChange.description: When population data last changed (from GemRate)

updatedAt.description: When this record was last updated

data.description: Single object when querying by tcgPlayerId, array otherwise, null if not found
